title: FIX-347: Post-Install Validation for hlx update
description: Walkthrough of changes that add post-install validation to hlx update, ensuring broken installs are detected and reported instead of silently succeeding.

steps.title: execSync replaced with spawnSync
steps.description: The import is changed from execSync to spawnSync. This is the foundation for capturing npm stderr on the success path.

steps.title: Return type extended with stderr field
steps.description: The function's return type now includes `stderr?: string`. This is additive and backward-compatible — existing callers that only destructure `success` and `error` are unaffected.

steps.title: spawnSync call with shell:true and encoding:utf8
steps.description: The npm install command is passed as a single string with shell:true (required for Windows npm.cmd resolution) and encoding:utf8 (returns strings not Buffers). The full command string avoids DEP0190 deprecation warnings.

steps.title: stderr captured and returned on success
steps.description: In quiet mode, stderr is captured and returned even on success. This allows callers to surface npm tar warnings when post-install validation fails.

steps.title: validateInstall function — the core validation logic
steps.description: New function that validates the globally-installed package. Returns { valid, binTargetPath, error? } — never throws. Three sequential checks: npm root resolution, file existence, and version execution.

steps.title: Step 1: Resolve global node_modules via npm root -g
steps.description: Uses npm root -g (not npm prefix -g) to get the exact global node_modules path. This is cross-platform and works regardless of npm configuration.

steps.title: Step 2: Check bin target file existence
steps.description: Checks that dist/index.js exists at the expected path under the global node_modules. This catches the exact failure scenario from the ticket — a dist/ tree with .d.ts files but no compiled JavaScript.

steps.title: Step 3: Run version check to confirm CLI can start
steps.description: Runs `node <binTarget> --version` with HLX_SKIP_UPDATE_CHECK=1 to prevent recursion. This catches cases where the file exists but is corrupt or has missing dependencies.

steps.title: Import validateInstall
steps.description: The new validate module is imported into the update command handler.

steps.title: Manual update: validation gate before metadata save
steps.description: After npm succeeds but BEFORE saveConfig(), validateInstall() is called. If validation fails: error message, npm stderr, and recovery instructions are printed, then process.exit(1). This ensures broken installs are never reported as successful and metadata is never poisoned.

steps.title: Auto-update: validation gate with warn-and-continue
steps.description: In the auto-update path, validation failure warns to stderr but does NOT call process.exit(). It returns early before saveConfig(), preserving the user's ability to retry with 'hlx update'. This ensures auto-update never blocks the user's current command.
